mapper.sql: SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS user_name, t.real_name AS teacher_name, lr.name AS lab_name, au.real_name AS audit_user_name FROM lab_reservation r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user t ON t.id = r.teacher_id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON au.id = r.audit_user_id LEFT JOIN lab_room lr ON lr.id = r.lab_id
mapper.select:
WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND r.status IN (3, 4)
AND (r.user_id = #{userId} OR r.teacher_id = #{userId})
AND r.lab_id IN
#{lid}
ORDER BY r.check_in_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lab_reservation SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE lab_reservation SET status = 3, check_in_time = #{time} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE lab_reservation SET status = 4, check_out_time = #{time} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM lab_reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 AND create_time < #{cutoff}
SELECT id FROM lab_reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND check_in_time IS NULL AND start_time < #{cutoff}
SELECT id FROM lab_reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 3 AND check_out_time IS NULL AND end_time < #{cutoff}
